responses.en: Hello! Welcome to our server! How can I help you today?
I'd be happy to help! Please describe your issue and our team will assist you as soon as possible.
I'm Toolmetry AI Bot! I can help with moderation, fun commands with GIFs, tickets, leveling, and much more. Use /help to see all commands!
You can create a ticket by clicking the 'Create Ticket' button in the ticket panel, or by using /ticket create <subject> command.
You're welcome! If you need anything else, feel free to ask!
I'm sorry you're experiencing issues. Please create a ticket with details about the bug, and our team will look into it right away.
Great idea! Please create a ticket with your feature request, and our development team will consider it.
